sentences.english: What is your dream job and why?
Explain what makes it appealing to you.
My dream job would be working as a documentary filmmaker.
First I'm passionate about storytelling and I believe documentaries have the power to change how people think about important issues.
sentences.korean: 첫째 스토리텔링에 열정이 있고 다큐멘터리가 중요한 이슈에 대한 사람들의 생각을 바꿀 힘이 있다고 믿어요.

sentences.english: Second it would allow me to travel the world and meet fascinating people from all walks of life.
sentences.korean: 둘째 세계를 여행하며 각계각층의 매력적인 사람들을 만날 수 있을 거예요.

sentences.english: Every project would be completely different which means the work would never become boring or repetitive.
sentences.korean: 모든 프로젝트가 완전히 다를 거라 일이 지루하거나 반복적이지 않을 거예요.

sentences.english: I know it's a competitive field but that challenge is part of what makes it so appealing.
sentences.korean: 경쟁이 치열한 분야인 건 알지만 그 도전이 매력의 일부예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work
